beats.label: Arrival
beats.title: The scroll is the camera.
beats.body: Your brand, as a world. Scroll — the camera is already moving.

beats.label: Brief
beats.title: Tell us the story
beats.body: One brief. We turn it into scenes, copy, and a camera path.

beats.label: Build
beats.title: Machines do the rendering
beats.body: Stills, flights, seamless connectors — quality-gated at every pass.

beats.label: Worlds
beats.title: Five production lines
beats.body: Scroll sites, UGC ads, anime, documentaries, faceless YouTube. Same engine.

beats.label: Begin
beats.title: Start your world
beats.body: Down payment starts it. Three months later you own it forever.

pricing.title: Own it. Never rent it.
pricing.plan: Own it in 3 months. Pay as you grow. Keep it forever.

compute.title: Bring your own GPU
compute.body: Renders run on cloud GPU you control. We recommend RunPod or Vast.ai — our referral links save us both money.

form.title: Start your world
form.sent: Brief received. We reply within one business day.
